seo.title: Kling 3.0 Omni 4K Reference-to-Video Generator | MaxVideoAI
seo.description: Use Kling 3.0 Omni 4K for native 4K reference-guided Kling video with storyboard images, @Image anchors, optional start/end frames, and delivery-grade output. Use Standard or Pro for source-video V2V.

overview: Kling 3.0 Omni 4K is the native 4K Kling route for reference-guided and storyboard-guided delivery renders.
pricingNotes: Provider cost is about $0.42/s before the MaxVideoAI margin.

hero.title: Kling 3.0 Omni 4K reference-guided video for final delivery
hero.intro: Use Kling 3.0 Omni 4K when reference images, storyboard frames, or style anchors should guide a native 4K Kling render without being forced as the opening frame. This 4K route is not the source-video video-to-video route.
hero.badge: Reference images · Native 4K · Storyboard inputs · No V2V

items.title: Final renders after 3.0 Omni Standard or Pro tests

technicalOverview.label: Reference images
technicalOverview.body: Upload up to 7 reference images and mention them as @Image1, @Image2, etc. for storyboard, style, or composition guidance.

technicalOverview.label: No source-video V2V
technicalOverview.body: Kling 3.0 Omni 4K is reference-first for 4K delivery. It does not support source-video video-to-video in the current MaxVideoAI route; use 3.0 Omni Standard or Pro when @Video1 and keep_audio are required.

promptStructure.title: Prompting Kling 3.0 Omni 4K references
promptStructure.quote: Use @Image1 as the approved storyboard frame and @Image2 as the style reference. Render a native 4K cinematic shot with stable character continuity.
promptStructure.description: Treat 3.0 Omni 4K as the delivery pass for an already validated reference workflow. The prompt should map each input image to a clear creative role before the expensive 4K render.
steps: Validate the idea in 3.0 Omni Standard or 3.0 Omni Pro first
Choose Reference mode for storyboard or style images
Lock the intended motion, framing, audio choice, and continuity constraints
Use 3.0 Omni Standard or Pro if the workflow needs @Video1 source-video V2V or keep_audio
Use Kling 3 4K only when the uploaded image must open the clip

faqs.q: When should I use Kling 3.0 Omni 4K?
faqs.a: Use it after the reference workflow is approved and you need native 4K output. Use Kling 3.0 Omni Standard or Pro for cheaper iteration.

No. The current 4K route is for reference-guided native 4K generation, not source-video V2V. Use Kling 3.0 Omni Standard or Pro when the prompt must reference @Video1 or preserve source audio with keep_audio.
